Car Dealerships have become a scam.

I booked a Car from Honda Township Motors Lahore in February, 2022. As per agreement, delivery was scheduled for November, 2022. Nearly a year has passed but. Rather than solving the problem, they ask for more money for another model which is more costly and a further delay in delivery.

1 year in waiting for the car and yet, all you get is excuses. Where do you go? What do you do? There is no one to question Honda Township Motors

Bought a City Aspire from this dealership. Mr. Samar was the person who dealt with me. I would say that the services provided by Mr. Samar from the start of the deal until the delivery of my required car file and smart card were simply marvelous. He was very patient and clarified all my queries in the beginning and then he delivered everything well before time, whether it was the car itself or the registration documents. This was the best experience I could imagine from a car dealership and only because of Mr. Samar.
Many thanks to Mr. Samar. I really fall short of words to express the good services he provided. Whatever he promised, he was always well before time to deliver. Very patient, courteous and humble person. Thank you again.

Previous Review:

Insanely expensive.
Estimation charges: 15,000/-.
Parking Charges: 1,500/- per day.
Rocket Clip: 200/- each which is 10/- to 20/- each in market.
When visited open market, I found that the prices of parts at Honda Township are at least 2-3 times higher as compared to same quality genuine parts in the market.

Services are also insanely expensive. Simple compound polish is almost 3 times higher.

The staff here is amazing, better than most however the reason i am giving it one star is because of how their management treats the staff.

Their staff is the reason their customer gets satisfied but in this scorching heat and pandemic around us. They were being served water in a desi cooler with ice bricks bought from the outside with one disposable glass placed to be shared by the whole staff.

The other water dispenser can be clearly seen inside the waiting room for the customers. How hard it is for them to install one for their own employees? It put me off that they are saving the cost on the wrong side.
